domain: Reasoning Distillation Platforms for Small Models

demand_signals.signal: serjester: alternatives force users into 'an incredibly fragmented ops stack' - highlights pain of stitching multiple tools together
Entire playbook exists because there is no integrated tool - documents 12 best practices people must manually implement

demand_signals.source: Medium - Model distillation in agent era
demand_signals.signal: Documents multi-step fragmented workflow as primary pain point for practitioners
Users asking how to reproduce distillation models - indicates lack of clear end-to-end tooling

validated_gaps.title: Automated Reasoning Trace Quality Scoring & Filtering

demand_signals.signal: Entire benchmark created to study data quality impact on CoT distillation - proves data quality is THE bottleneck
Current pipelines treat all training examples equally, which overlooks latent structure - fine-tuning on full corpora can degrade performance
Case study: basic distillation yielded F1 of 50, would not meet deployment bar - quality filtering is critical

demand_signals.source: Research - Local Naturalness for Teacher Data
demand_signals.signal: Local selection strategies significantly outperform global scoring methods - proves automated quality scoring is needed and feasible
Benchmark scores alone don't determine effective teacher model - data curation and selection matter more than scale
Coding-based medical reasoning is a unique capability not captured by specialization in either coding or medicine alone
Differential Reasoning Learning needed specifically for clinical agents - general distillation insufficient
Generalisability of reward models from broad-domain to medical reasoning uncertain - domain-specific tooling needed
Current findings dominated by math/programming tasks. Applicability to open-ended domains remains open question
SFTTrainer does not support custom metrics for evaluation - hard to track fine-tuning quality
SFTTrainer fails with DFT loss during evaluation - evaluation tooling is buggy/incomplete
CoT Quality Score proposed in research but not productized - 5-point scale across coherence/completeness/correctness
Establishing comprehensive evaluation protocols remains an open challenge

validated_gaps.title: Multi-Teacher Reasoning Distillation with Automatic Teacher Selection

demand_signals.signal: Feature request: support for closed-source models as teachers in GKD Trainer - users want multi-source distillation
When multiple teachers available, effective curation to select the most beneficial individual responses is critical
simonw: ToS restrictions prevent using OpenAI models to train competitor models - multi-teacher routing around restrictions is needed

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Distillation for Sub-1B Models and On-Device Deployment

demand_signals.signal: Llamba-1B achieves comparable benchmark performance with 12x throughput - proves sub-1B reasoning distillation viable
Apple investing heavily in on-device LLM inference - edge reasoning is a priority
Feature request for HRM architecture in Ollama - community wants efficient reasoning on-device
Distilling LLM reasoning into compact SLMs for robotics - domain demand for small reasoning models
OpenThoughts-114k and Dolphin-R1 800k datasets created to fill void - proves demand for curated reasoning data
Sky-T1 created for under $50 using just 5K carefully curated samples - data quality/selection more important than quantity
EasyDistill created OmniThought dataset with Reasoning Verbosity and Cognitive Difficulty scores - metadata is valued

validated_gaps.title: Continuous Distillation / Teacher Model Update Pipeline

demand_signals.signal: Enabling efficient adaptation to continually evolving teacher models and datasets remains an open challenge
Enterprise deployment requires continuous updating as base models improve - no automated pipeline exists
LLM observability needs evaluations beyond latency/cost - reasoning quality monitoring is gap in all observability tools
Agentic observability exists but no specific reasoning quality monitoring for distilled models
5K samples outperformed 100K+ sample approaches - massive cost savings possible with right guidance
Research paper title 'Beyond Scaling Law: Data-Efficient Distillation Framework' - data efficiency is active research area
Budget and timeline are primary concerns cited by practitioners evaluating distillation
OmniThought dataset has Reasoning Verbosity scores - proves verbosity control is valued
Simplification of reasoning chains shown to improve distillation - but no tool exposes this control
Users requesting knowledge distillation with VRAM efficiency - joint distillation+quantization would address this
NVIDIA combines pruning+distillation but not reasoning-aware quantization

validated_gaps.title: Open Source Alternative to OpenAI Distillation API

demand_signals.signal: janalsncm: 'unless I can download the weights it wouldn't replace my workflow' - users want OpenAI ease with open-source freedom
msp26: storing datasets within OpenAI creates dependency - users want to own their data and models
Article titled 'Graduate from OpenAI to Open Source' - proves demand for migration path
Strategic imperative for enterprises: avoid vendor lock-in while maintaining ease of use
Distilling LLM Agent into Small Models with Retrieval and Code Tools - paper addresses nascent area
AgentKD is early stage - only tool addressing this, proving both demand and immaturity
ToolBrain framework for agentic tool distillation using Unsloth/QLoRA - community building custom solutions
Llamba proves viability with 12x throughput gains - but framework is architecture-specific, not general

demand_signals.source: HN - Less is more: Recursive reasoning with tiny networks
demand_signals.signal: Interest in tiny efficient reasoning networks - non-transformer architectures getting attention
